LanguageData.Sanguophage.scenario.parts.0.customSumma: Start with one adult or child Wendigo and one human companion of any age.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.scenario.parts.2.text:
The old tales were supposed to be superstition until you became one of them. You are a Wendigo now - hard to kill, harder to trust, and always hungry.
When the hunters closed in, you fled aboard the first failing craft that would lift off. It did not stay in the air for long. Now you wake in the wreckage with one companion, a cold knot of hunger in your gut, and the wasteland deciding what kind of monster you will be.
